control.description-key: A styled action button for model-driven forms. Writes an event name to a bound field on click so OnChange business rules can trigger flows, navigation, or custom logic.

property.name: label
property.description-key: Text displayed on the button face. Defaults to Button when left blank.

property.name: icon
property.description-key: Icon displayed alongside the label. Select None to show no icon. When Icon Position is set to IconOnly the label is hidden and only the icon is rendered.

property.name: tooltipText
property.description-key: Text shown when the user hovers over the button. Also used as the accessible aria-label. Leave blank to fall back to the label.

property.name: buttonStyle
property.description-key: Visual style variant. Primary = brand blue. Secondary = neutral grey. Danger = red. Success = green. Ghost = transparent with blue text.

property.name: size
property.description-key: Button size. Small = compact toolbars. Medium = default form buttons. Large = prominent calls-to-action. XLarge = hero or landing-page buttons.

property.name: iconPosition
property.description-key: Where the icon appears relative to the label. Left = before label. Right = after label. Top = above label. IconOnly = hides the label.

property.name: borderRadius
property.description-key: Corner rounding in pixels (0-50). 0 = sharp corners. 4 = default subtle rounding. 50 = fully pill-shaped.

property.name: backgroundColor
property.description-key: Custom background colour as a hex value (e.g. #8764B8). Overrides the Button Style colour.

property.name: textColor
property.description-key: Custom label and icon colour as a hex value (e.g. #ffffff). Overrides the Button Style text colour.

property.name: isDisabled
property.description-key: When set to Yes the button is rendered as non-interactive. Use this to conditionally lock the button from a business rule or Power Fx expression.

property.name: confirmationRequired
property.description-key: When set to Yes a confirmation popover appears above the button before the click event fires. Use this for destructive or irreversible actions.

property.name: confirmationMessage
property.description-key: Message shown inside the confirmation popover. Defaults to Are you sure you want to proceed? when left blank.

property.name: confirmationYesText
property.description-key: Label for the confirm button in the confirmation popover. Defaults to Yes when left blank.

property.name: confirmationNoText
property.description-key: Label for the cancel button in the confirmation popover. Defaults to No when left blank.

property.name: eventName
property.description-key: The string written to the bound field when the button is clicked. Use a unique value per button on the form (e.g. createOpportunity, sendEmail).

property.name: buttonClicked
property.description-key: Bind this property to a Single line of text column. The value is set to Event Name on click and reset to blank after 600 ms. Wire your action logic to the column OnChange event.
